-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_RESOURCE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
    RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    ORDERNO BIGINT NULL ,
    CONTENT TEXT NULL ,
    EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    PATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_RESOURCE PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'低代码平台资源表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCENAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源描述' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCEDESC';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源类型(模块分类、模块、页面、前端脚本、后端脚本)' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCECATEGORY';

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    BPCODE VARCHAR(30)  NULL ,
    BPNAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    BPDESC VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    TABLENAME VARCHAR(150)  NULL ,
    ACTIVATEDFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
    ACTIVATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    ACTIVATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    ACTIVATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    VERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'工作流' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'工作流编码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'BPCODE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'工作流名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'BPNAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'工作流描述' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'BPDESC';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'绑定页面ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCEID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'绑定页面名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCENAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'绑定表名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'TABLENAME';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_COMMENT(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    BPID BIGINT NULL ,
    BPACTIONID BIGINT NULL ,
    BPACTIONCODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    BPACTIONNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    TABLENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    BIZID BIGINT NULL ,
    AUDITUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    AUDITUSERNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    COMMENTS VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
    AUDITTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    BPNODECODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    BPNODENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    NEXTBPNODECODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    NEXTBPNODENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,

-- 表管理
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_TABLE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    TABLENAME VARCHAR(60)  NOT NULL,
    TABLEDESC VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    VERSION BIGINT NULL ,
	SQL TEXT NULL ,
    SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_TABLE PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'低代码平台表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_TABLE';

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'表名' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_TABLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'TABLENAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'表注释' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_TABLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'TABLEDESC';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'版本' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_TABLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'VERSION';

    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,

    FIELDNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    FIELDCOMMENT VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    FIELDTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    FIELDLENGTH VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    ALLOWNULL VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
    DEFAULTVALUE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    FIELDOPERATIONTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
	CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD PRIMARY KEY(ID));

-- ----------------------------- 2022-10-27 add by yangshuzhi------------end
-- ----------------------------- 2022-10-31 add by yangshuzhi------------begin
-- 删除默认值约束存储过程
CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.p_dropcolumnconstraint

@tableName nvarchar(100),--表名
@columnName nvarchar(100)--列名
as
declare @cnt nvarchar(100)
declare @sqlcmd nvarchar(1024)
select @cnt= b.name from sysobjects b join syscolumns a on b.id = a.cdefault where a.id = object_id(@tableName) and a.name = @columnName
set @sqlcmd = 'ALTER TABLE '+ @tableName +' DROP constraint ' + @cnt;
exec sp_executesql @sqlcmd;

-- 文件操作系统脚本
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_CORE,1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.delete');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_CORE,1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.upload');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_CORE,1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.selectPagination');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_RESOURCE (ID,RESOURCENAME,RESOURCEDESC,RESOURCECATEGORY,PARENTID,ORDERNO,CONTENT,EFFECTVERSION,"PATH",CREATEDBYID,CREATEDBYNAME,CREATEDTIME,CREATEDBYORGID,CREATEDBYORGNAME) VALUES (1,'FileScript','文件操作系统脚本','java',0,1,'import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;


public class FileScript{


    /**
     * 查询附件数据
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */
    public Page<CoreFileBean> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);

        return filePage;
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}',1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript',null,null,null,null,null);

GO

'COLUMN', N'METHODNAME'

GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'方法路径',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD',
'COLUMN', N'METHODPATH'
GO
alter table dbo.T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD ADD SERVERSCRIPTID BIGINT NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'服务端脚本ID',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD',
'COLUMN', N'SERVERSCRIPTID'

update T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD set METHODPATH = [PATH] ;
update T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD set SERVERSCRIPTID = RESOURCEID ;


alter table dbo.T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD drop column PATH
GO
DROP INDEX IDX_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD_RESOURCEID ON T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD GO

alter table dbo.T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD drop column RESOURCEID
GO

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    MODULETMPLID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
    RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    ORDERNO BIGINT NULL ,
    CONTENT TEXT NULL ,
    EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    PATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
    CLASSNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'自定义模板资源表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'模块模板ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'MODULETMPLID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCENAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源描述' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCEDESC';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源类型' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCECATEGORY';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'父ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'PARENTID';

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'生效版本' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'EFFECTVERSION';

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IDX_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE_MODULETMPLID] ON [dbo].[T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE] ([MODULETMPLID]);

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP(
    ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL,
    CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID BIGINT NULL ,
    COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
    TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL ,
    VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CONFIG VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
    CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,

alter table dbo.T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS ADD REJECTFIELD VARCHAR(120) NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'退回字段',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS',
'COLUMN', N'REJECTFIELD'
GO
alter table dbo.T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS ADD STATUSDISPLAYFIELD VARCHAR(120) NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'状态显示字段',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS',
'COLUMN', N'STATUSDISPLAYFIELD'
GO
alter table dbo.T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS ADD STATUSFIELD VARCHAR(120) NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'状态字段',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS',
'COLUMN', N'STATUSFIELD'
GO


EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.REJECTFIELD',N'退回字段',N'退回字段',N'zh-CN',N'退回字段'
GO
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.STATUSDISPLAYFIELD',N'状态显示字段',N'状态显示字段',N'zh-CN',N'状态显示字段'
GO
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N N'T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.STATUSFIELD',N'状态字段',N'状态字段',N'zh-CN',N'状态字段'
GO

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    SEQUENCEID VARCHAR(64)  NULL ,
    SEQUENCECODECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    SEQUENCECODE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    ORDERNO BIGINT NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'编号规则明细' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'sequenceId' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'SEQUENCEID';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG(
    ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL,
    CONFIGCONTENT TEXT NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC SYS.SP_ADDEXTENDEDPROPERTY @NAME=N'MS_Description', @VALUE=N'低代码系统全局配置' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG';
EXEC SYS.SP_ADDEXTENDEDPROPERTY @NAME=N'MS_Description', @VALUE=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC SYS.SP_ADDEXTENDEDPROPERTY @NAME=N'MS_Description', @VALUE=N'配置内容' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CONFIGCONTENT';

EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME', N'低代码系统全局配置', N'低代码系统全局配置', N'zh-CN',N'低代码系统全局配置';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.ID', N'低代码系统全局配置的主键', N'主键', N'zh-CN',N'主键';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.CONFIGCONTENT', N'低代码系统全局配置的配置内容', N'配置内容', N'zh-CN',N'配置内容';

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    NAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    CONTENT VARCHAR(3000)  NULL ,
    ORDERNO BIGINT NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'脚本代码块表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'NAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'脚本代码块类型' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CATEGORY';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'父ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'PARENTID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'代码块内容' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CONTENT';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'排序码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ORDERNO';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单人编码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDBYID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单人名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDBYNAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单时间' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDTIME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单人单位编码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDBYORGID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单人单位名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDBYORGNAME';

EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.SERVICE_NAME', N'脚本代码块表', N'脚本代码块表', N'zh-CN',N'脚本代码块表';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.ID', N'脚本代码块表的主键', N'主键', N'zh-CN',N'主键';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.NAME', N'脚本代码块表的名称', N'名称', N'zh-CN',N'名称';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CATEGORY', N'脚本代码块表的脚本代码块类型', N'脚本代码块类型', N'zh-CN',N'脚本代码块类型';

EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CONTENT', N'脚本代码块表的代码块内容', N'代码块内容', N'zh-CN',N'代码块内容';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.ORDERNO', N'脚本代码块表的排序码', N'排序码', N'zh-CN',N'排序码';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYID', N'脚本代码块表的制单人编码', N'制单人编码', N'zh-CN',N'制单人编码';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYNAME', N'脚本代码块表的制单人名称', N'制单人名称', N'zh-CN',N'制单人名称';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDTIME', N'脚本代码块表的制单时间', N'制单时间', N'zh-CN',N'制单时间';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYORGID', N'脚本代码块表的制单人单位编码', N'制单人单位编码', N'zh-CN',N'制单人单位编码';
EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYORGNAME', N'脚本代码块表的制单人单位名称', N'制单人单位名称', N'zh-CN',N'制单人单位名称';

-- 处理数据
UPDATE T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG SET CONFIGCODE = ID;
UPDATE T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG SET VERSION = 1;
UPDATE T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG SET EFFECTFLAG = '1';

ALTER TABLE DBO.T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG DROP CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG;
ALTER TABLE DBO.T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG DROP COLUMN ID;
ALTER TABLE DBO.T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG ADD ID BIGINT;
EXEC SYS.SP_ADDEXTENDEDPROPERTY @NAME=N'MS_Description', @VALUE=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
UPDATE T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG SET ID = NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_CORE;

UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CONTENT ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
     /**
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */

    public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
		List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
		List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
		for (Object row : rows) {
			  Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
                map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                    if (column != null) {
                        // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                        if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        }
                    }
                });
			mapList.add(map);
		}

         return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}' WHERE ID = 1;

UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CLASSCONTENT  ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
     /**
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */

    public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
		List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
		List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
		for (Object row : rows) {
			  Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
                map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                    if (column != null) {
                        // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                        if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        }
                    }
                });
			mapList.add(map);
		}

         return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}' WHERE ID = 1;
GO

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    CLASSNAME VARCHAR(150)  NULL ,
    FULLNAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
	CODESOURCE TEXT NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE PRIMARY KEY(ID));

CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IDX_LCDPSS_FULLNAME] ON [dbo].[T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE] ([FULLNAME]);
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'代码源码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'类名' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CLASSNAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'全类名' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'FULLNAME';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    CHECKOUTUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    MODULEIDLIST VARCHAR(3000)  NULL ,
    CATEGORYIDLIST VARCHAR(3000)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'低代码平台资源检出记录表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'检出用户ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CHECKOUTUSERID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'检出的模块ID集合' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'MODULEIDLIST';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'检出的分类ID集合' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CATEGORYIDLIST';
INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CHECKOUT_RECORD', '0', '0');

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    [COMMIT] VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'提交日志' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG';

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'提交日志' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'COMMIT';

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单人名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDBYNAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'制单时间' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CREATEDTIME';

-- 导入时对已提交数据没有更新生效状态导致导入之后 之前的数据也是生效状态数据 处理数据
Select  *  Into  T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY_back  FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY ;
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY SET EFFECTFLAG ='no';
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY  SET EFFECTFLAG = 'yes' WHERE ID in(SELECT TLRH .id FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE tlr JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY tlrh  ON TLR.ID = TLRH.RESOURCEID WHERE TLR.EFFECTVERSION = TLRH.VERSION );
GO

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_VIEW(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    VIEWNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    TABLENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    SELECTSTATEMENT VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
    VERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_VIEW PRIMARY KEY(ID));

    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    SYSTEMNAME VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,

-- ----------------------------- 2023-05-10 add by yangsz------------begin
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CLASSCONTENT  ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
    /**
    *
    * @param wrapper
    */

   public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

       Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
    List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
    List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
    for (Object row : rows) {
          Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
               map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                   if (column != null) {
                       // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                       if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                           try {
                               value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                               map.put(column,value);
                           } catch (Exception ex) {
                           };
                       } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                           try {
                               value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                               map.put(column,value);
                           } catch (Exception ex) {
                           };
                       }
                   }
               });
        mapList.add(map);
    }

        return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
   }

   /**
    * 上传附件
    */
   public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

       Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

       return fileId;
   }

   /**
    * 删除附件
    */
   public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
       ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
       return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
   }

   /**
    *    修改附件
    */
   public LcdpResultDTO updateData(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
       ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).save(wrapper);
       return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
   }
}' WHERE ID = 1;
GO

INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD
(ID, METHODNAME, METHODPATH, SERVERSCRIPTID, DELETEFLAG, DELETEDBYID, DELETETIME, MAPPINGTYPE, METHODDESC)
VALUES(NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_CORE, NULL, 'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.updateData', 1, '0', NULL, NULL, 'DEFAULT', NULL);
GO

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    CHECKOUTUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    CHECKOUTTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    TABLENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    TABLEDESC VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD PRIMARY KEY(ID));

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_API_NOTIFIER(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    USERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    USERNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    EMAIL VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    MOBILE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_API_NOTIFIER PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'接口通知人' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_API_NOTIFIER';

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'用户编码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_API_NOTIFIER', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'USERID';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP(
    ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL,
    TMPLCONFIGID BIGINT NULL ,
    COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
    TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL ,
    VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CONFIG VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
    CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
    COMPTAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'页面模板页面组件表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP';

-- ----------------------------- 2023-08-02 add by yangsz------------begin

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL ,
    CODE VARCHAR(128)  NULL ,
    I18NCONFIGID VARCHAR(32)  NULL ,
    MESSAGE VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'功能模块页面国际化表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';

update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'service' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Service';
update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'event' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Event';
update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'eventListener' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Listener';
update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'utils' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Utils';
update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'filter' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Filter';
update t_lcdp_resource set scripttype = 'aspect' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Aspect';

update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'service' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Service';
update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'event' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Event';
update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'eventListener' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Listener';
update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'utils' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Utils';
update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'filter' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Filter';
update t_lcdp_resource_history set scripttype = 'aspect' where resourcecategory = 'java' and scripttype is null and resourceName like '%Aspect';
GO

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_KEYMAP(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    COMMAND VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(120) NULL ,
    BINDING VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
    CATEGORY VARCHAR(12)  NULL ,
    TEMPLATE TEXT  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_KEYMAP PRIMARY KEY(ID));

EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'低代码代码快捷键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'命令名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'COMMAND';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'命令描述' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'DESCRIPTION';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'绑定的快捷键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'BINDING';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'命令分类' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CATEGORY';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'模板' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'TEMPLATE';

EXEC  DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_KEYMAP.SERVICE_NAME', N'低代码代码快捷键表', N'低代码代码快捷键表', N'zh-CN',N'低代码代码快捷键表';

INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_KEYMAP', '0', '0');

alter table dbo.T_LCDP_RESOURCE ADD CHECKOUTUSERID VARCHAR(36) NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'检出人编码',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE',
'COLUMN', N'CHECKOUTUSERID'

-- 处理历史数据
UPDATE R SET R.CHECKOUTUSERID = (SELECT H.CREATEDBYID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0') FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no'  AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0');
UPDATE R SET R.CHECKOUTTIME = (SELECT H.CREATEDTIME FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0') FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE R
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0');

alter table dbo.T_LCDP_RESOURCE ADD MODIFYVERSION INT NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'反写历史表中的修改版本',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE',
'COLUMN', N'MODIFYVERSION'
GO

EXEC DBO.INSERTI18N  N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE.MODIFYVERSION', N'历史表中的最大修改版本', N'历史表中的最大修改版本', N'zh-CN',N'历史表中的最大修改版本';

UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE R SET R.MODIFYVERSION = (SELECT MAX(H.MODIFYVERSION) FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID)
 WHERE R.RESOURCECATEGORY = 'java';

-- ----------------------------- 2024-10-23 add by zhangjr------------begin
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP_1023(
    ID VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID VARCHAR(36) NULL ,
    CONFIG VARCHAR(4000) NULL ,
    CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000) NULL ,
    CONFIGEXTEND1 VARCHAR(4000) NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL 
);

INSERT INTO T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP_1023
SELECT
	ID,
	MODULEPAGEHISTORYID,
	MODULEPAGEID,
	MODULEPAGEVERSION,
	"TYPE",
	PARENTID,
	CONFIG,
	CONFIGEXTEND,
	CONFIGEXTEND1,
	CREATEDBYID,
	CREATEDBYNAME ,
	CREATEDTIME ,
	CREATEDBYORGID ,
	CREATEDBYORGNAME
FROM
	T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP;


ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP ADD CONFIGBAK text NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'组件配置',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP',
'COLUMN', N'CONFIGBAK'
GO

UPDATE T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP
   SET CONFIGBAK = (CONFIG + COALESCE(CONFIGEXTEND, '') + COALESCE(CONFIGEXTEND1, ''));

ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP DROP COLUMN CONFIG;
ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP DROP COLUMN CONFIGEXTEND1;
ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP DROP COLUMN CONFIGEXTEND;

EXEC sys.sp_rename N'T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.CONFIGBAK', N'CONFIG', 'COLUMN';

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    MENUID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL ,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
    EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    BUTTONDATAID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    BUTTONID VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    BUTTONPARENTID VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    BUTTONPARENTNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    VISIBLEROLES VARCHAR(72)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    BUTTONNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'页面按钮权限' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'菜单编码' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'MENUID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCEID';

-- ----------------------------- 2025-05-14 add by liuxia------------begin
CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP_0514(
    ID VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL ,
    CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID BIGINT NULL ,
    COMPID VARCHAR(36) NULL ,
    TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID VARCHAR(36) NULL ,
    CONFIG VARCHAR(4000) NULL ,
    CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000) NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL
);

INSERT INTO T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP_0514
SELECT
	ID,
	CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID,
	COMPID,
	"TYPE",
	PARENTID,
	CONFIG,
	CONFIGEXTEND,
	CREATEDBYID,
	CREATEDBYNAME ,
	CREATEDTIME ,
	CREATEDBYORGID ,
	CREATEDBYORGNAME
FROM
	T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP;


ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP ADD CONFIGBAK text NULL
GO

EXEC sp_addextendedproperty
'MS_Description', N'组件配置',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP',
'COLUMN', N'CONFIGBAK'
GO

UPDATE T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP
   SET CONFIGBAK = (CONFIG + COALESCE(CONFIGEXTEND, ''));

ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP DROP COLUMN CONFIG;
ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP DROP COLUMN CONFIGEXTEND;

EXEC sys.sp_rename N'T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.CONFIGBAK', N'CONFIG', 'COLUMN';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CONTENT TEXT NULL ,
    CLASSCONTENT TEXT NULL ,
    VERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    EFFECTFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PATH VARCHAR(400)  NULL ,
    MODIFYVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    COMPILEDVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    DELETEFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    DELETEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    DELETETIME DATETIME NULL ,
    SCRIPTTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    EVENTNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    LCDPFILEPATH VARCHAR(720)  NULL ,
    VERSIONOFFSET BIGINT NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'历史表瘦身备份表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'主键' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'ID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源ID' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCEID';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源名称' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCENAME';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'资源类型' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'RESOURCECATEGORY';
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'内容' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', @level2type=N'COLUMN',@level2name=N'CONTENT';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK(
    ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL,
    MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL ,
    MODULEPAGEVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CONFIG TEXT NULL ,
    COMPARECOLUMN VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK PRIMARY KEY(ID));

    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    BUTTONNAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,

    BUTTONCONTENT TEXT NULL ,

    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    RECORDID BIGINT NULL ,
    RESOURCEID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
    RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    DELETEFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
    RESOURCEOPERATIONS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    ROLLBACKABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    OPERATIONVERSION BIGINT NULL ,
    CONSTRAINT PK_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL PRIMARY KEY(ID));
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty @name=N'MS_Description', @value=N'导入记录详细表' , @level0type=N'SCHEMA', @level0name=N'dbo', @level1type=N'TABLE',@level1name=N'T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL';

CREATE TABlE DBO.T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP(
    ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
    PARENTID BIGINT NULL ,
    FIELDNAME VARCHAR(90)  NULL ,

    FIELDTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,

    PRECISION BIGINT NULL ,
    SCALE BIGINT NULL ,

    DEFAULTVALUE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    FIELDSTATUS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    ORDERNO BIGINT NULL ,
    GROUPFLAG BIGINT NULL ,
    I18NCODE VARCHAR(240)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
    CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
    CREATEDTIME DATETIME NULL ,

'MS_Description', N'HTTP状态码',
'SCHEMA', N'dbo',
'TABLE', N'T_LCDP_API_RES',
'COLUMN', N'STATUSCODE'
GO

'COLUMN', N'TIMES'
GO

-- ----------------------------- 2026-03-21 add by shixw------------begin
CREATE TABLE dbo.T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CONVERT_RECORD (
    ID bigint NOT NULL,
    RESOURCEID bigint NOT NULL,
    MODULEID bigint NULL,
    MODULENAME nvarchar(120) NULL,
    RESOURCENAME nvarchar(120) NULL,
    RESOURCECATEGORY nvarchar(60) NULL,
    RESOURCEPATH nvarchar(500) NULL,
    OUTPUTROOT nvarchar(500) NULL,
    CONVERTSTATUS nvarchar(30) NULL,
    GENERATEDFILES nvarchar(max) NULL,
    CREATEDBYID nvarchar(50) NULL,
    CREATEDBYNAME nvarchar(120) NULL,
    CREATEDTIME datetime NULL,
    CREATEDBYORGID nvarchar(50) NULL,
    CREATEDBYORGNAME nvarchar(120) NULL,
    LASTUPDATEDBYID nvarchar(50) NULL,
    LASTUPDATEDBYNAME nvarchar(120) NULL,
    LASTUPDATEDTIME datetime NULL,
    CONSTRAINT PK_T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CONVERT_RECORD PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UK_LCDP_RS_CONVERT_RECORD_01 ON dbo.T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CONVERT_RECORD(RESOURCEID);
EXEC sys.sp_addextendedproperty 'MS_Description', N'低代码资源转源码记录表', 'schema', N'dbo', 'table', N'T_LCDP_RESOURCE_CONVERT_RECORD';
-- ----------------------------- 2026-03-21 add by shixw------------end
